zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Devereux於1365年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親William Devereux50歲，母親Anne Barre53歲。他於1383年與Agnes Crophull結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1402年7月25日在威爾士享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾維奧布利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Devereux于1365年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲William Devereux50岁，母亲Anne Barre53岁。他于1383年与Agnes Crophull结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1402年7月25日在威尔士享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾維奧布利。

nameMeanings.name: Devereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Devereux was born in 1365, in Herefordshire, England, his father, William Devereux, was 50 and his mother, Anne Barre, was 53. He married Agnes Crophull in 1383. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 July 1402, in Wales, at the age of 37, and was buried in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Devereux est né en 1365, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Devereux, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Anne Barre, avait 53 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Crophull en 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1402, à Galles, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Devereux 1365 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Devereux 50 und seine Mutter Anne Barre 53. Er hat 1383 Agnes Crophull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juli 1402 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Wales und wurde in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux è nato il nel 1365 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, William Devereux, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Anne Barre, aveva 53 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Crophull nel 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 luglio 1402, nel Galles, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Weobley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Devereuxが1365年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Devereuxは50歳，母Anne Barreは53歳であった。1383年にAgnes Crophullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1402年7月25日にウェールズで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Devereux(이)가 1365년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Devereux(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Barre(은)는 53세였다. 그는 1383년 Agnes Crophull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1402년 7월 25일 웨일스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 w오블리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Devereux nasceu em 1365, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Devereux, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Anne Barre, tinha 53 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Crophull em 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1402, em Gales, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Devereux родился в 1365 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Devereux было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Barre, 53. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Crophull в 1383 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 июля 1402 г. в местности Уэльс в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Devereux nació en 1365, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Devereux, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Anne Barre, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Agnes Crophull en 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de julio de 1402, en Gales, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
